sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move player to row ~13 to see if path touches R
# Current: player at row 36, R at row 13
# 6 UP = 24 rows, player at row 12 (close to R at row 13)

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
before = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N', 'M'] and n['pixels'] in [16, 18]:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(r for r, c in boundary)
        if min_row < 50:
            before[n['color']] = min_row
print(f"Before: {before}")

action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N', 'M'] and n['pixels'] in [16, 18]:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(r for r, c in boundary)
        if min_row < 50:
            after[n['color']] = min_row
print(f"After 6 UP: {after}")

# Check path connection
adj = current_frame.segmentation['adjacency_list']
path_touches = None
for pair in adj:
    i, j = pair
    ni = nodes[i]
    nj = nodes[j]
    if ni['color'] == 'M' and nj['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N']:
        path_touches = nj['color']
        break
    if nj['color'] == 'M' and ni['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N']:
        path_touches = ni['color']
        break
print(f"Path touches: {path_touches}")

# Also check via gray path nodes
for pair in adj:
    i, j = pair
    ni = nodes[i]
    nj = nodes[j]
    if ni['color'] == 'g' and nj['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N']:
        print(f"Gray path touches {nj['color']}")
    if nj['color'] == 'g' and ni['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N']:
        print(f"Gray path touches {ni['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
